data.body: DONE (commit 8ae4872). Canonical --output/-o implemented; --json/--format removed. Single Python source ticket_output.py (profiles reader/ready/report) + thin shim ticket-output.sh. Migrated ready/show/list/validate/next-batch/bridge-status + library + dispatcher + internal self-call + all tests (test_ready_json.py->test_ready_output.py). External git/acli/jira/gh flags untouched. Full suite: 1277 passed, 2 xfailed.
